narrative:
Newton Falls Ex Vill Sd (Trumbull) exempted village school district has 5,536 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.6 percentage points.
